ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class or category */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model for the class */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model for the class */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score of the model for the class */,
  "support" INTEGER /* Number of instances in the class */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (training or evaluation) */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the metrics belong to */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* Confusion matrix for the class */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the performance metrics */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters of the model */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Time it took to train the model */,
  "last_deployment" TEXT /* Date of the last model deployment */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Current version of the model */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_size" INTEGER /* Number of instances in the dataset */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Current version of the dataset */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "date_changed" TEXT /* Date the version was changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "date_changed" TEXT /* Date the version was changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the deployment belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date the model was deployed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the deployment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)
